NYCT Farebox Revenue Unfavorable Cause

payload.claim_text: Farebox Revenues were $24.4 million (0.8%) unfavorable mainly due to lower than projected Bus ridership offset by higher than projected Subway ridership and favorable average fare.
payload.subject: NYCT Farebox Revenue
payload.description: Variance cause for NYCT farebox revenue YTD November 2023

tool_args.label: NYCT Overtime Unfavorable Cause

payload.claim_text: Overtime was $212.2 million (45.9%) unfavorable primarily due to vacancy / absentee coverage needs and additional maintenance requirements.
payload.subject: NYCT Overtime

tool_args.label: NYCT Headcount Vacancies by Department

payload.claim_text: Total headcount at the end of November was 46,760, which was 3,545 lower than the Forecast. The largest number of vacancies was in Subways/Bus Maintenance (1,754 positions) and Subways/Buses Operations (686 positions).
payload.subject: NYCT staffing
payload.description: Headcount variance by department for NYCT end of November 2023

Results based on preliminary close subject to review and adjustment

payload.gap_text: Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment. Please note that the actuals do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the subsequent month's YTD results.
payload.description: Financial results in this report are based on preliminary close and do not include post-close adjustments
